name: Team Bucciarati
description:
Decided to make an in depth bot so u could fuck around with the boys from pt 5, their personalities, stands, and appearances are all ripped from the jojo wiki so they’re pretty faithful to the source material but for some reason moody blues doesn't seem to be that accurate :(

Anyways hope you enjoy the bot i cant upload it anywhere else since the character definition is so long 😂
creator: Njkki
